prompt: A photorealistic, casual top-down snapshot of an open lined notebook resting on a textured gray fabric surface. The notebook pages are filled with neat, legible Korean handwriting. The right page is the main focus, starting with the date "2024 10월 18일 금요일" at the top left and a printed "Date." at the top right. Below the date is a small hand-drawn sun icon next to the text "날씨: 맑음". The rest of the page contains about 14 lines of handwritten text detailing a student's daily diary entry about going to academies, taking tests, eating kimchi jjigae, and studying. The left page is partially visible, also containing handwritten Korean text. The lighting is natural and soft, giving the impression of a personal, everyday photograph.
